list-pdf-form-field-names.title: List PDF Form Field Names with FormEditor
list-pdf-form-field-names.description: Shows how to bind a PDF using FormEditor, access the Form facade, retrieve all AcroForm field names, and output them to the console.

add-text-field-to-pdf-using-formeditor.title: Add Text Field to PDF Using FormEditor
add-text-field-to-pdf-using-formeditor.description: Demonstrates how to insert a new text field at specific coordinates on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor and save the modified document.

fill-textbox-field-in-pdf.title: Fill TextBox Field in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Form Facade
fill-textbox-field-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class to fill a specific AcroForm text box field and save the updated PDF to a new file.

justify-text-in-filled-pdf-form-textbox.title: Justify Text in a Filled PDF Form TextBox
justify-text-in-filled-pdf-form-textbox.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form text box and then apply justified alignment using the FormEditor and FormFieldFacade classes.

justify-text-in-filled-textbox.title: Justify Text in a Filled PDF TextBox
justify-text-in-filled-textbox.description: Shows how to fill a PDF text box field and apply justified alignment by configuring FormFieldFacade and calling FormEditor.DecorateField.

retrieve-radio-button-options-hashtable.title: Retrieve Radio Button Options and Store in Hashtable
retrieve-radio-button-options-hashtable.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to get all option values of a radio button group and transfer them into a Hashtable for further processing.

get-selected-radio-button-value.title: Get Selected Radio Button Value from PDF Form
get-selected-radio-button-value.description: Demonstrates how to read the currently selected option of a radio button group in an AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form field values from a PDF document into an XML file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form field values from a PDF document into an FDF file via a file stream.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XFDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to export all form field values from a PDF document to an XFDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form facade.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON and Validate
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to export all AcroForm field values from a PDF into an indented JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and then verifies that the generated JSON is well‑formed.

import-form-fields-from-xml.title: Import Form Field Values from XML into PDF
import-form-fields-from-xml.description: Shows how to open a PDF with AcroForm fields, import field values from an XML file using the Form facade, and save the populated PDF.

import-fdf-data-into-pdf.title: Import FDF Data into PDF using Form Facade
import-fdf-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to import form data from an FDF file into an existing PDF and save the updated document using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf.description: Shows how to read an XFDF file and import its form field values into an existing PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

import-json-form-data-into-pdf.title: Import JSON Form Data into PDF
import-json-form-data-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, import AcroForm field values from a JSON file, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Batch Export PDF Form Data to XML
batch-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Shows how to iterate over multiple PDF files, bind each with the Form facade, and export its AcroForm data to separate XML files.

batch-import-json-form-data.title: Batch Import Form Data from JSON Files into PDFs in Parallel
batch-import-json-form-data.description: Creates sample PDFs with form fields, generates matching JSON files, and imports the JSON data into the PDFs concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.

combine-exported-json-from-multiple-pdfs.title: Combine Exported JSON from Multiple PDFs into a Single JSON Array
combine-exported-json-from-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to export AcroForm data from several PDF files to JSON, merge the individual JSON objects into one JSON array, and write the combined result to a file.

export-acroform-data-to-xml-memorystream.title: Export AcroForm Data to XML Using MemoryStream
export-acroform-data-to-xml-memorystream.description: Demonstrates how to export PDF form field data to an XML string using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade and a MemoryStream, avoiding any temporary files on disk.

merge-acroform-data-into-json.title: Merge AcroForm Data from Multiple PDFs into JSON
merge-acroform-data-into-json.description: Loads several PDF files, extracts their AcroForm fields as JSON using the Form facade, and aggregates the results into a single JSON array file.

export-customer-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export Customer Form Fields to XML
export-customer-form-fields-to-xml.description: Shows how to filter AcroForm fields whose names start with "Customer" and write their values to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-selected-acroform-fields-to-json.title: Export Selected AcroForm Fields to JSON
export-selected-acroform-fields-to-json.description: Demonstrates exporting only specific form fields from a PDF to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf's ExportFieldsToJsonOptions with a field selector.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form While Ignoring Missing Fields
import-json-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to read a PDF form, filter a JSON payload to keep only fields present in the PDF, and import the filtered data using Form.ImportJson.

validate-xml-xsd-import-pdf-form.title: Validate XML against XSD and Import into PDF Form

unicode-form-field-utf8-export-import.title: Unicode Form Field Export/Import with UTF-8
unicode-form-field-utf8-export-import.description: Demonstrates filling AcroForm fields with Unicode text, exporting the data to a UTF-8 encoded XML file, and importing it back into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

list-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.title: List PDF Form Fields and Export to CSV
list-pdf-form-fields-to-csv.description: Shows how to read AcroForm field names and their types from a PDF using FormEditor and write the information to a CSV report.

export-text-form-field-names-to-json.title: Export Text Form Field Names to JSON
export-text-form-field-names-to-json.description: The example opens a PDF, iterates through its AcroForm fields, selects only text fields, and writes the field names to a JSON array file.

add-radio-button-group-with-default-sele.title: Add Radio Button Group with Default Selection using FormEditor
add-radio-button-group-with-default-sele.description: Demonstrates how to add a radio button group with three options to a PDF and set a default selected option programmatically using the FormEditor facade.

verify-radio-button-options.title: Verify Radio Button Options in an AcroForm
verify-radio-button-options.description: Shows how to extract the export values of a radio button group from a PDF AcroForm using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and compare them with an expected set to validate form integrity.

export-import-acroform-xfdf-roundtrip.title: Export and Import AcroForm Data via XFDF (Round‑Trip Verification)
export-import-acroform-xfdf-roundtrip.description: The example fills an AcroForm PDF with test values, exports the field data to an XFDF file, then imports the XFDF into a fresh copy of the PDF to verify that the round‑trip conversion preserves the original field values.

fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON using Aspose.Pdf
fill-pdf-form-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to load a JSON file, map its keys to AcroForm field names, and populate a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form.

fill-acroform-fields-from-byte-array.title: Fill AcroForm Fields from Byte Array
fill-acroform-fields-from-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, fills specified AcroForm fields using the Form facade, and returns the modified PDF as a byte array.

extract-pdf-acroform-field-names.title: Extract PDF AcroForm Field Names to JSON
extract-pdf-acroform-field-names.description: Shows how to open a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, read all AcroForm field names, and output them as an indented JSON array from a command‑line utility.

fill-pdf-acroform-fields.title: Fill PDF AcroForm Fields with Aspose.Pdf.Facades
fill-pdf-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to open a PDF, populate its AcroForm fields from a dictionary, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON and Deserialize
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to indented JSON using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then deserialize the JSON into a strongly‑typed C# list.

import-json-data-into-pdf-acroform.title: Import JSON Data into PDF AcroForm with Aspose.Pdf
import-json-data-into-pdf-acroform.description: Shows how to serialize a C# object to JSON, load it into a MemoryStream, and import the data into an AcroForm using the Aspose.Pdf Form facade.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json-chunks.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON in 100-Field Chunks
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json-chunks.description: Loads a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, exports all form fields to a JSON stream, and splits the output into multiple JSON files each containing up to 100 fields.

export-pdf-form-data-to-html.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML and Convert to HTML with XSLT
export-pdf-form-data-to-html.description: Demonstrates exporting AcroForm field values from a PDF to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and then transforming the XML into an HTML view with XSLT.

import-xml-data-validate-required-fields.title: Import XML Data into AcroForm and Validate Required Fields
import-xml-data-validate-required-fields.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with AcroForm fields, import field values from an XML file, check required fields for empty values, and save the filled PDF.

import-json-data-into-pdf-form-with-miss.title: Import JSON Data into PDF Form with Missing Field Handling
import-json-data-into-pdf-form-with-miss.description: Demonstrates importing form field values from a JSON file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and catching FormException to log any missing fields.

async-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.title: Asynchronously Export PDF Form Data to XML
async-export-pdf-form-data-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to export AcroForm fields from a PDF to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade without blocking the UI thread by leveraging async/await and Task.Run.

generate-pdf-form-fields-report.title: Generate PDF Form Fields Report
generate-pdf-form-fields-report.description: Creates a PDF document that lists all AcroForm fields from an input PDF, displaying each field's name, type, and value in a formatted table.
